notes: Kastner: 'Systems-Oriented Architecture and Web Services based on industry standards are in use at many enterprises and will make up the majority of development by the turn of the decade.'

metric_value: ~10 years for significant dividends in lower IT lifecycle costs
notes: Kastner: 'Some ten years down the road, investments in SOA and reusable code will be paying back enormous dividends in lower IT application asset life-cycle costs and faster, more flexible application changes.'

metric_name: IT budget freed by best-in-class vs. average
metric_value: 15% of IT budget freed with lower software maintenance costs
notes: Aberdeen research shows best-in-class IT organizations free up 15% of the IT budget with lower software maintenance costs compared to average; most savings redeployed to IT innovation.

metric_value: tens of millions of lines of code discarded in 2004
notes: Microsoft halted Windows Vista OS work and discarded tens of millions of lines of code in 2004 to institute programming process change enabling lower lifecycle cost; cited as evidence of programmer productivity crisis.

metric_value: technically mature in 2006; most enterprises have tepid reactive strategy
notes: Kastner states mobility technology is technically mature enough in 2006 but most enterprises lack proactive strategy for generating business value from it.

metric_value: considered a company secret / competitive weapon by large RTBI-experienced companies
notes: Mostly large companies with RTBI experience consider business value generation so critical that the 'how' becomes a company secret.

metric_name: Network vendor encroachment on server market
metric_value: Cisco angling to provide intelligent network services that to date have been run on conventional servers
notes: Kastner warns Sun and other server suppliers: Cisco is positioning to deliver intelligent network services, making solutions selection more complex and competitive.

metric_value: SOA is a good vehicle for virtualizing processing, storage, and network components
notes: Kastner explicitly links SOA to infrastructure virtualization — a notable conceptual connection between SOA and what would later be called cloud infrastructure.

metric_value: EII promises to augment traditional data warehouse technology for RTBI
notes: EII identified as key RTBI enabler; data warehouses look at older information while RTBI/EII targets near-real-time decision making.

metric_value: leading companies will translate massively parallel scientific computing lessons into commercial computing grid
notes: Kastner predicts movement towards greater real-time operational analysis and decision making via commercial grid. Prescient relative to later cloud/HPC convergence.

metric_value: datacenters will gradually become JBOR (just a bunch of racks)
notes: Kastner's JBOR concept describes deconstruction of monolithic datacenter into separated compute and storage racks — aligns with commodity hardware hyperscale model that emerged later.

metric_value: fact-based benchmarking, best practices, technology solution selection and implementation studies
notes: Aberdeen Enterprise Integration practice will research IT manager benchmarking, best practices, and lessons from technology solution selection and implementation via fact-based research surveys and CIO portal.
